summary: FASE 2 Testing Complete - Gestión de Servicios with catalog integration fully working. Backend 13/13 tests passed, Frontend UI testing passed all flows.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - this is caused by React DevTools overlay and does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All FASE 2 features implemented and working correctly
Service types catalog properly integrated with 9 active types
Multiple services for same client work with unique case numbers
Aprobar and Anular flows work as expected for Admin/Supervisor roles
seed_data_creation: Test services created via pytest and Playwright (prefixed with TEST_ and UI_TEST) were marked as anulado for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 2 is complete. Current state: 9 service types in catalog, multiple services exist with unique case numbers TN-2026-XXXXX format. Juan Pérez has 2 services (TN-2026-00001, TN-2026-00002). One técnico 'prueba 2' available. Test data with TEST_ prefix has been anulado. UI_TEST Cliente Playwright service (TN-2026-00007) created via Playwright testing.

backend: POST /api/services - creates service with tipo_servicio_id from catalog
GET /api/services - lists services with full client data and service type names
PUT /api/services/{id}/aprobar - correctly rejects already approved services
PUT /api/services/{id}/anular - marks services as anulado with razon
Multiple services per client with unique case numbers
frontend: Services list page displays all service data (client info, service type, técnico, observaciones, fecha)
Create Service modal with tipo_servicio dropdown populated from catalog (9 types)
Estado filter dropdown works correctly (Todos, Pendiente, Aprobado, Anulado, etc.)
Service creation flow works - service created with aprobado status for admin
Service cards show appropriate action buttons (Editar, Anular) based on estado
